dependencyDashboardTitle: Renovate Dashboard — #902 L3 third-party image digests

customManagers.description: #902 L3 — split-knob Helm values (image.repository/tag/digest) for the 7 digest-pinned third-party charts. The '# renovate:' annotation above each 'repository:' anchors the match so multi-image charts (da-portal/tenant-api also carry a first-party app image) cannot cross-match tag/digest across blocks.

#902 L3 — single-line 'image: repo:tag@sha256:...' refs: mariadb-instance Helm values, raw k8s manifests, and the tenant-api alpine/git init template. Only refs that already carry an @sha256 digest match — first-party tag-only images (handled by the release flow) are skipped.

#902 L3 — the scan-thirdparty matrix 'ref:' entries in nightly-image-scan.yaml. Renovate updates these in the SAME branch as the deploy ref (identical depName) so the drift-guard test (matrix == deploy refs) stays green; a missed sync turns the drift-guard RED in the Renovate PR's own CI.

packageRules.description: #902 L3 — group all non-major third-party image updates (incl. digest-only refreshes) into ONE PR for low review noise. The self-hosted workflow's weekly cron sets the cadence; a manual workflow_dispatch (incl. dry-run) runs on demand.

#902 L3 — MAJOR upgrades can break (grafana/prometheus/mariadb majors carry config/schema changes). Require an explicit tick on the Dependency Dashboard before Renovate opens the PR, rather than auto-flooding a breaking bump.
